tasks.subject: Task 0: _resolve_warm_instance helper + unit tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement the shared validation helper end-to-end with full verdict-gate coverage. Foundation for every other task.

**Files:**
- Create: `tests/cli/test_resolve_warm_instance.py`
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/cli/_commands.py` — add `_resolve_warm_instance` + `_refuse_reason_for_verdict` after `_classify_for_status` (~line 617).

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- 17 unit tests pass.
- Helper signature matches spec §3.3.
- Verdict gate honours D3.
- Exit codes per D2.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/cli/test_resolve_warm_instance.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/cli/_commands.py", "tests/cli/test_resolve_warm_instance.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/cli/test_resolve_warm_instance.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["17 unit tests pass", "_resolve_warm_instance signature matches spec §3.3", "verdict gate honours D3", "exit codes per D2"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: _cmd_generate wiring + argparse flags + dispatch tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire `--instance-id` and `--force-attach` flags through `p_generate`, thread the resolved Instance into `generate(...)`, verify dispatch end-to-end.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/cli/_main.py` lines 304–320.
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/cli/_commands.py` line 278 (_cmd_generate body).
- Modify: `tests/cli/test_main_flow.py`.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- `kinoforge generate --instance-id <id>` threads instance= into generate().
- `--force-attach` without `--instance-id` exits 2.
- Unknown id exits 1.
- `--force-attach` + IDLE_REAP entry dispatches normally.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/cli/test_main_flow.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/cli/_main.py", "src/kinoforge/cli/_commands.py", "tests/cli/test_main_flow.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/cli/test_main_flow.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["kinoforge generate --instance-id <id> threads instance= into generate()", "--force-attach without --instance-id exits 2", "unknown id exits 1", "--force-attach + IDLE_REAP entry dispatches normally"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: _cmd_batch wiring + dispatch tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Same wiring shape as Task 1 but for `kinoforge batch --instance-id`. Single pod across every manifest row (D7).

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/cli/_main.py` lines 400–423.
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/cli/_commands.py` line 329 (_cmd_batch body).
- Modify: `tests/cli/test_main_flow.py`.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- `kinoforge batch --instance-id` threads instance= into batch_generate().
- Single Instance shared across all manifest rows.
- cap_key mismatch exits 2 before batch_generate runs.
- `--force-attach` without `--instance-id` exits 2.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/cli/test_main_flow.py -v -k batch`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/cli/_main.py", "src/kinoforge/cli/_commands.py", "tests/cli/test_main_flow.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/cli/test_main_flow.py -v -k batch", "acceptanceCriteria": ["kinoforge batch --instance-id threads instance= into batch_generate()", "single Instance shared across all manifest rows", "cap_key mismatch exits 2 before batch_generate runs", "--force-attach without --instance-id exits 2"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: _cmd_list capability_key column
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Append `capability_key=<12-char hash>` to every `kinoforge list` row. Pure ledger read; zero new RPC.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/kinoforge/cli/_commands.py` line 459 (_cmd_list body).
- Modify: `tests/cli/test_commands_routing.py`.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- list shows capability_key=<hash>.
- Legacy entry shows capability_key=<unknown>.
- Hash sourced from entry.tags.kinoforge_key.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/cli/test_commands_routing.py -v -k list`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/cli/_commands.py", "tests/cli/test_commands_routing.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/cli/test_commands_routing.py -v -k list", "acceptanceCriteria": ["list shows capability_key=<hash>", "legacy entry shows capability_key=<unknown>", "hash sourced from entry.tags.kinoforge_key"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: FakeProvider end-to-end smoke
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Drive the full CLI through `cli.main([...])` against LocalProvider and assert the warm-attach path skips `create_instance`.

**Files:**
- Create: `tests/live/test_warm_attach_dry_run.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Full CLI exits 0.
- Stdout contains `generated: uri=`.
- create_instance call_count == 0.
- get_instance called with the supplied id.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/live/test_warm_attach_dry_run.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/live/test_warm_attach_dry_run.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/live/test_warm_attach_dry_run.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["full CLI exits 0", "stdout contains 'generated: uri='", "create_instance call_count == 0", "get_instance called with the supplied id"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: README + PROGRESS + warm-reuse-tasks closeout
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Document operator workflow; mark B4 done in trackers.

**Files:**
- Modify: `README.md`.
- Modify: `PROGRESS.md` line 147.
- Modify: `warm-reuse-tasks.txt` lines 367–455.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- README has discovery loop + bypassable-verdict matrix.
- PROGRESS B4 entry struck through with closeout pointer.
- warm-reuse-tasks.txt B4 starter replaced with closeout line.

**Verify:** `git diff HEAD~1 README.md PROGRESS.md warm-reuse-tasks.txt`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["README.md", "PROGRESS.md", "warm-reuse-tasks.txt"], "verifyCommand": "git diff HEAD~1 README.md PROGRESS.md warm-reuse-tasks.txt", "acceptanceCriteria": ["README has discovery loop + bypassable-verdict matrix", "PROGRESS B4 entry struck through with closeout pointer", "warm-reuse-tasks.txt B4 starter replaced with closeout line"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Full-suite green gate
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Confirm the existing test suite remains green and the spec's AC1–AC12 are all satisfied.

**Files:** No source edits. Diagnostic-only.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- full pytest exits 0.
- lint exits 0.
- typecheck exits 0.
- every AC1-AC12 maps to a passing test.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest && pixi run lint && pixi run typecheck`

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest && pixi run lint && pixi run typecheck", "acceptanceCriteria": ["full pytest exits 0", "lint exits 0", "typecheck exits 0", "every AC1-AC12 maps to a passing test"]}
```
